content: agent1: implementing 'Remove Temperature Modulation; Add Deterministic Prompt Cache Salt' in dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py only. Will add _cache_salt method to GroundedProposer, remove temperature epsilon logic, add cache_salt InputField to signatures. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

Ack. I'm editing: DescribeProgram/DescribeModule signatures (adding cache_salt field), generate_instruction_class (adding cache_salt field), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward (adding cache_salt param), and propose_instruction_for_predictor (removing temperature epsilon logic, adding _cache_salt method + call). Your tip selection logic in propose_instructions_for_program should be mostly disjoint from my changes but that method also calls propose_instruction_for_predictor with T= - I'm keeping T as an unused param for API compat, so your call site shouldn't need changes. Will merge via git after both done.
